items.title: Not a Deer
items.description: Animals, usually deer but any kind of prey sufices, they have faint humanoid characteristic and a very high and dark inteligence.

items.title: Slenderman
items.description: Supernatural creature of non finite power but criptic rules.

items.title: Bigfoot / Sasquatch
items.description: Large, ape-like humanoid said to inhabit forests and wilderness areas

items.title: Yeti
items.description: Himalayan counterpart to Bigfoot, associated with snow and mountains

items.title: Chupacabra
items.description: Creature blamed for draining blood from livestock

items.title: Mothman
items.description: Winged humanoid associated with omens and disasters

items.title: Jersey Devil
items.description: Winged, horse-headed creature said to haunt forests

items.title: Wendigo
items.description: Gaunt, monstrous being tied to hunger, cold, and cannibalism

items.title: Skinwalker
items.description: Shapeshifting entity from folklore, often mimicking humans or animals

items.title: Goatman
items.description: Humanoid with goat-like features, often linked to rural legends

items.title: Loch Ness Monster
items.description: Large aquatic creature said to inhabit a Scottish lake

items.title: Champ
items.description: Lake monster reported in North American waters

items.title: Ogopogo
items.description: Serpentine lake creature from Canadian folklore

items.title: Thunderbird
items.description: Massive bird associated with storms and power

items.title: Ropen
items.description: Flying creature said to glow in the dark

items.title: Dogman
items.description: Wolf-like humanoid seen walking upright

items.title: Lizardman
items.description: Reptilian humanoid associated with swamps

items.title: Shadow People
items.description: Dark humanoid figures seen at the edge of perception

items.title: Black-Eyed Children
items.description: Strange childlike figures with entirely black eyes

items.title: Flatwoods Monster
items.description: Alien-like entity with unusual shape and glowing features

items.title: Fresno Nightcrawler
items.description: Minimalistic humanoid figure with long legs and no visible arms

items.title: Fresno Nightcrawler
items.description: Minimalistic humanoid figure with long legs and no visible arms

items.title: Mandela Catalogue
items.description: World plagued by 'Alternates'—entities that mimic humans and psychologically torment victims

items.title: Local 58
items.description: Broadcast signal hijacked by cosmic or lunar influence causing paranoia and mass manipulation

items.title: Gemini Home Entertainment
items.description: Nature and space corrupted by alien entities infiltrating reality through media

items.title: The Monument Mythos
items.description: Distorted alternate history with living monuments and hidden cosmic forces

items.title: The Walten Files
items.description: Haunted animatronics and fragmented memories tied to disappearances

items.title: The Backrooms
items.description: Endless liminal space filled with entities and psychological decay

items.title: Meat Park
items.description: Grotesque theme park blending flesh, identity loss, and surreal transformation

items.title: Angel Hare
items.description: Religious-themed series with unsettling undertones and hidden corruption

items.title: The White Stag Education
items.description: Educational system masking deeper psychological manipulation and control

items.title: Kraina Grzybów (Mushroom Land)
items.description: Psychedelic children’s media hiding disturbing and surreal undertones

items.title: Daisy Brown
items.description: Lonely girl documenting strange creature development and isolation

items.title: This House Has People In It
items.description: Surveillance-style horror revealing hidden abnormalities in everyday life

items.title: Petscop
items.description: Disturbing game uncovering trauma, hidden messages, and lost children

items.title: The Smile Tapes
items.description: Infection spread through media causing psychological and physical breakdown

items.title: Woodlands National Park
items.description: Park broadcasts hiding disappearances and unnatural wildlife

items.title: Angelogy
items.description: Strange rules for beings made for guilty people and their yearning for punishment

items.title: Existential Terror
items.description: Unavoidable and uncaring event, a creeping doom took shape.

items.title: Eldrich Horror
items.description: An unknoable entity touches reality with curiosity or cruelty

items.title: Self-Sustained
items.description: Exists independently without needing external anchors

items.title: Object-Bound
items.description: Tied to a specific item or artifact

items.title: Memento-Bound
items.description: Anchored to an object with emotional or symbolic significance

items.title: Place-Bound
items.description: Linked to a specific location or territory

items.title: Territory-Bound
items.description: Influence extends across a defined area it controls

items.title: Person-Bound
items.description: Attached to a specific individual

items.title: Bloodline-Bound
items.description: Connected to a family or lineage

items.title: Ritual-Bound
items.description: Sustained by an ongoing or completed ritual

items.title: Contract-Bound
items.description: Exists through a pact, deal, or agreement

items.title: Belief-Bound
items.description: Sustained by faith, myth, or collective belief

items.title: Cult-Bound
items.description: Maintained by a group of followers or worshippers

items.title: Emotion-Bound
items.description: Feeds on or is sustained by a specific emotion

items.title: Trauma-Bound
items.description: Tied to a specific event of suffering or tragedy

items.title: Event-Bound
items.description: Linked to a recurring or significant event

items.title: Time-Bound
items.description: Only manifests under certain temporal conditions

items.title: Medium-Bound
items.description: Exists through a specific medium (TV, radio, internet)

items.title: Signal-Bound
items.description: Spreads through transmissions or information channels

items.title: Threshold-Bound
items.description: Tied to boundaries like doors, crossings, or liminal spaces

items.title: Path-Bound
items.description: Moves along specific routes or patterns
